docs.title: 📦 ArkKits (Example Plugin)
docs.text: ArkKits is an advanced plugin for Ark: Survival Evolved / Ascended that allows server admins to seamlessly distribute customizable starter items, dinos, and buffs to players based on permissions.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Dynamic Cooldowns: Prevent abuse with strict database-enforced cooldowns.
  • Dino Spawning: Spawn leveled, saddled tames directly to players.
  • Discord Integration: Log kit claims directly to a Discord webhook.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
1. Ensure you have the latest version of ArkApi installed on your server.
  2. Download the .zip file from your Bytemarts Dashboard.
  3. Extract the ArkKits folder.
  4. Drop the folder into ShooterGame/Binaries/Win64/ArkApi/Plugins.
  5. Restart or launch your Ark server.

Next step: Head over to the Configuration page to set up your first kit.

docs.title: Commands & Permissions
docs.text: This plugin features both in-game chat commands for players and remote RCON commands for server owners.

docs.title: Player Chat Commands
docs.text: Command Description Required Permission /kits Opens the UI to list all available kits. ArkKits.Use /kit <name> Immediately claims a specific kit. ArkKits.Use.<name>

docs.title: Example Usage:
docs.text: ❯ /kit Starter - Gives the player the Starter kit if it is off cooldown.

docs.title: RCON / Console Commands
docs.text: Command Description Kits.Reload Reloads the config.json file on the fly without restarting the server. Kits.ResetCooldown <SteamID> <KitName> Resets the cooldown timer for specific player's kit.

docs.title: 🔐 Permissions System
docs.text:
ArkKits relies heavily on ArkApi's built-in permissions system. You must grant the exact permissions matching your config.json. To grant a VIP group permission to the "AlphaKit":

Permissions.AddGroup VIP
Permissions.Grant VIP ArkKits.Use.AlphaKit

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text: The main configuration file is located at ArkApi/Plugins/ArkKits/config.json. Make sure to use a tool like JSONLint to validate your config after making changes.
